title: REITs: How Much Is Inflation Protection Worth?
text: Multifamily REITs are rightly understood to provide excellent protection from inflation and are often priced quite high compared to REITs from other sectors, such as net lease REITs. They are not priced so highly at the moment, which leads some analysts to expect strong gains from here.

title: Equity Residential Publishes Investor Presentation
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that in connection with upcoming investor meetings, the Company has posted an updated Investor Presentation to its website. The presentation can be found in the Investor section of www.equityapartments.com. About Equity Residential Equity Residential is committed to creating communities where people thrive.

title: Coastal Apartments: Better Than Feared As Trends Stabilize
text: The major coastal apartment operators have reported fourth quarter 2022 earnings and provided conservative yet better-than-feared forward guidance for the coming year. These results provide an attractive backdrop for a total return performance in the coming quarters.

title: Equity Residential: Attractive Valuation And Solid Results Make It A Strong Buy
text: Equity Residential delivered record results for 2022, and gave very solid guidance for 2023. The company is trading at a significant valuation discount, whether on P/CFO, dividend yield, P/NAV, or price to replacement cost.

title: Equity Residential (EQR) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR ) Q4 2022 Results Conference Call February 10, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Marty McKenna - IR Mark Parrell - President and CEO Michael Manelis - COO Bob Garechana - CFO Alec Brackenridge - CIO Conference Call Participants Nick Joseph - Citi John Pawlowski - Green Street Chandni Luthra - Goldman Sachs Steve Sakwa - Evercore ISI John Kim - BMO Capital Markets Adam Kramer - Morgan Stanley Haendel St. Juste - Mizuho Jeff Spector - Bank of America Nick Yulico - Scotiabank Alexander Goldfarb - Piper Sandler Ami Probandt - UBS Operator Good day, and welcome to the Equity Residential Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast. title: Equity Residential Reports Fourth Quarter 2022 Results
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today reported results for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2022. title: Should You Buy Equity Residential (EQR) Ahead of Earnings?
text: Equity Residential (EQR) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Would a Housing Crash Hurt Equity Residential's Earnings?
text: Some are predicting that a few overheated markets could see 2008-style price corrections.

title: Is a Beat in Store for Equity Residential (EQR) in Q4 Earnings?
text: Equity Residential's (EQR) Q4 results are likely to benefit from its portfolio diversification efforts and technology investments despite softness in demand in the quarter.
